description: Discussion on the potential of Decentralized Science (DeSci) at the Solana DeScience Fair, focusing on funding models, integration of AI and blockchain in healthcare, and making science more accessible.
topic_summary: Exploration of how DSCI can transform scientific research and healthcare through decentralized technology and community involvement. Highlights include the need for blockchain in healthcare [t=53:34] and the alignment of rare diseases and crypto [t=70:04].
